built: Website Inline Validation — Shared validated-field.tsx component + micro-interactions (shake, checkmark pop, focus glow) added to all 6 forms across makeamouve.com. Dark + light theme support. Deployed to Vercel. (12 March)
4 ACE Lifestyle Homepage Redesigns — Created in Paper with distinct visual directions: Sage & Cream, Deep Emerald, Natural Earth, Fresh Lime. (12 March)
GHL Dedup — Bulk duplicate cleanup: 24 phoneless contacts deleted, keepers tagged, Airtable ghl_contact_id updated. Scripts: ghl-dedup-dry-run.py + ghl-dedup-execute.py. (11 March)
LF-13 Filtering Fix — Changed attendance matching from class name substring to event day-of-week. Prevents Thursday/Sunday online class cross-contamination. Deployed to n8n. (11 March)
class_reminder_sunday template — Submitted to Meta for Thursday→Sunday advance reminders. Variables: name, class, time, venue. (11 March)

Win-Back Emails COMPLETE — 7 emails designed in Paper + converted to production HTML for GHL. 2 sequences: A (4 emails, 134 recent families) + B (3 emails, 820 cold families). Annual show callout + photo in A2/B1. Copy fixed for safeguarding. Briefing emailed to Louise.

Party Lifecycle Engine — Phases 1-4 COMPLETE. 5 emails designed (Paper + HTML), 3 GHL workflows live, booking form + parent details form + feedback form all live. All merge fields fixed (double underscore). WhatsApp template approved. Task 5.2 architecture planned (n8n + 5 GHL workflows). Demoed to Louise. (12 March)
WhatsApp Integration — eSIM purchased, number connected to GHL, 2 Meta templates approved, LF-13 n8n workflow built (15 nodes), test message delivered successfully to Rob's phone.

9 branded onboarding emails built and deployed LIVE to GHL workflow. Table-based HTML, mobile responsive, Paper mockup-matched. Replaced 7 plain-text originals with 9 (added Month Check-in + Renewal).
Full financial deep dive — Stripe API pull (4 accounts, £81.9K net), Xero transaction analysis (386 ACCPAY invoices + ManualJournals), DSP revenue reconstruction.
Verified revenue: £290,984 (+45% YoY) vs Xero's misleading £166,860 (-17%). £124K Xero reconciliation gap explained.
YoY Variance Analysis — profit waterfall (-£8.3K → +£161K), 20+ driver narratives, gross margin bridge (58.2% → 84.5%).
Revenue Reconciliation — line-by-line Xero vs external sources, AR aging, failed payment analysis.
Health Scorecard — 6 green areas, 1 red (bookkeeping), 6 amber. Forward projection: ~£500K revenue / ~£275K net profit FY2026.
Excel spreadsheet (9 tabs) + Word doc summary with verified tables.
Staff cost analysis: 45 → 37 freelancers, 3 PAYE departures identified (Rachel Smith, Tamarind, Sherry). £25K genuine saving.
improved: Financial snapshot doc updated with verified revenue, Stripe breakdown, staff analysis, full health assessment.
Dashboard financial summary updated from 4-month bookkeeper figures to 6-month verified Stripe/DSP data.
decisions: Sunday WhatsApp reminder now sent Thursday (class_reminder_sunday approved + deployed). Multi-class pipeline live. (11 March)
LF-13 filtering: day-of-week matching replaces class name matching to prevent cross-class contamination. (11 March)
Revenue verification: DSP reports + Stripe API + bank used as source of truth over incomplete Xero P&L (10 March)
Staff cost saving confirmed as structural (permanent departures), not cyclical (10 March)
Operating leverage identified as dominant profit driver — revenue +45% while COGS -46% (10 March)
risks: Bookkeeper lag critical — £124K+ unreconciled. P&L cannot be trusted for decision-making.
TeamUp 32% charge failure rate — ~£10K missed Ladies Fitness revenue from expired cards.
Amex balance £34K — needs verification (current spend vs accumulated debt).
School Clubs -20% — only genuinely declining revenue line. Root cause unknown.
Louise as single point of failure — absorbed work of 2-3 departed staff.

recent_decisions: LF-13 SplitInBatches reset bug — inner loop wasn't resetting between outer iterations, silently skipping Sunday reminders. Fixed + deployed. (13 March)
Facebook Lead Form missing postcode — 70% of Pipeline 1 leads have no postcode. Active form (Oct 2023) only collects name/phone/email. Rob to add postcode field. (13 March)
Party Lifecycle Engine — 6-touchpoint automated sequence. Louise keeps the sale, automation starts at booking. Extras upsell is reply-based. No pipeline initially — form + tag trigger. (11 March)
Revenue verification: Stripe API + DSP + bank confirms £290,984 (+45% YoY). Xero's -17% is 100% bookkeeper lag. (10 March)
Staff cost saving is structural — 8 fewer freelancers + 3 PAYE departures = permanent £25K+ saving. (10 March)
Operating leverage confirmed — 45% revenue growth with 46% COGS reduction = 84.5% gross margin. (10 March)
Win-back emails ready — 7 emails (2 sequences) designed, HTML built, briefing sent to Louise. Awaiting approval to go live 17 March. (10 March)
Onboarding sequence LIVE — 9 branded emails deployed to GHL workflow. Replaced 7 plain-text originals. (10 March)

governing_documents.name: Project MODE System
governing_documents.description: BUILD / REVIEW / SUMMARISE / IDLE mode governance. Post-compaction rules. Controlled execution over helpful autonomy.

governing_documents.name: Implementation Plan Protocol
governing_documents.description: Required format, phase status icons, mandatory sections. Every project with 3+ phases must have an implementation plan.
